response.justification: The candidate substantially exceeds the 6+ years requirement with roughly 15 years of professional experience, including recent full-stack TypeScript/Node.js product work, React and MongoDB in production, AWS and Kubernetes exposure, and current hands-on AI-agent infrastructure work (MCP code generators, agentic tooling) — a rare direct match for the AI agent development requirement. Strong testing culture (TDD, authored test frameworks, taught testing courses) aligns well with the quality expectations. Gaps are mostly framework-specific: no explicit Nest.js, Kotlin, or Vitest/Playwright experience, and a significant portion of the portfolio centers on the niche D language rather than the primary stack.
strengths: 15+ years full-stack experience with recent TypeScript/Node.js, React, MongoDB, and AWS production work
Current hands-on AI-agent and MCP tooling development, directly matching a hard-to-find requirement
Deep testing and software craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, authored test libraries, taught courses)
concerns: No explicit Nest.js, Kotlin, or Vitest/Playwright experience listed
Substantial portion of recent deep work is in D, a niche language outside the target stack
Frontend depth leans toward Ember.js; React exposure appears more limited

key_factors.factor: Long full-stack track record in TypeScript/Node ecosystem
